title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Dolutegravir First-Line ART in Sub-Saharan Africa v1.0
hero_h2: Dolutegravir vs Efavirenz First-Line ART in Sub-Saharan African Adults and Pregnant Women

pico.pop: ART-naive adults living with HIV in sub-Saharan Africa (ADVANCE: South Africa adults; NAMSAL: Cameroon adults; IMPAACT 2010: pregnant women in 6 sub-Saharan African countries plus India / Thailand)
pico.int: Dolutegravir-based ART (DTG + tenofovir + emtricitabine or lamivudine; tenofovir as TDF in NAMSAL / IMPAACT, TDF or TAF in ADVANCE)
pico.comp: Efavirenz-based ART (EFV 600 mg in IMPAACT and ADVANCE; EFV 400 mg in NAMSAL)
pico.out: Virologic suppression (HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 in ADVANCE / NAMSAL; <200 copies/mL at delivery in IMPAACT 2010, snapshot ITT)
pico.subgroup: Sex, baseline viral load, baseline CD4, country / region, NRTI backbone (TDF vs TAF), pregnant vs non-pregnant

real_data_entries.name: ADVANCE
real_data_entries.group: South African adults, TDF/FTC + DTG vs TDF/FTC/EFV first-line ART; week 48 virologic suppression (HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL, snapshot ITT)

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (primary, snapshot ITT)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Venter WD et al. NEJM 2019;381:803-815 (ADVANCE South Africa first-line DTG vs EFV).

real_data_entries.name: NAMSAL
real_data_entries.group: Cameroonian adults, TDF/3TC + DTG vs TDF/3TC + EFV 400 mg first-line ART; week 48 virologic suppression (HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL, snapshot ITT)

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL at week 48 (primary, snapshot ITT)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Calmy A et al. NEJM 2019;381:816-826 (NAMSAL ANRS 12313 Cameroon DTG vs EFV 400 mg).

real_data_entries.name: IMPAACT 2010
real_data_entries.group: ART-naive pregnant women initiating in 2nd / early 3rd trimester (multi-country: Botswana / Malawi / South Africa / Tanzania / Uganda / Zimbabwe + India + Thailand + US); DTG + FTC/TDF vs EFV/FTC/TDF; HIV-1 RNA <200 copies/mL at delivery (snapshot ITT)

allOutcomes.title: HIV-1 RNA <200 copies/mL at delivery (primary, snapshot ITT)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Lockman S et al. Lancet 2021;397:1276-1292 (IMPAACT 2010/VESTED pregnant women DTG vs EFV).
